title: Smudged
description: Vanilla+ with building and creative options.
body:
Hi, this is a vanilla+ish experience modpack. This modpack is meant to be played on a shared world where the creative building and decoration mods excel.

It's recommended to give this pack at least 4-6 gigabytes of RAM, more if you decide to play with distant horizons on.

## Modpack Contents
